modules.name: config
modules.description: Module-level constants for window dimensions, grid parameters, colors, game speed, and initial values. No classes, pure constant definitions.

modules.name: snake

classes.name: Snake
methods: __init__(self, grid_cols: int, grid_rows: int, initial_length: int = 3) -> None
change_direction(self, dx: int, dy: int) -> bool
check_boundary_collision(self, cols: int, rows: int) -> bool
classes.description: Pure logic component managing snake body coordinates and movement direction. Implements move-and-grow combined operation, direction change with reverse-intercept, boundary collision, and self-collision detection. No Pygame dependency.

modules.description: Snake entity: manages body as List[Tuple[int,int]] with head at index 0. Handles movement, growth, direction changes with anti-reverse check, and collision detection (boundary + self). Pure Python logic, no Pygame dependency.

modules.name: food

classes.name: Food
classes.description: Manages food position. respawn() computes all cells minus occupied, picks randomly; returns False when board is full (victory condition). Depends only on Python random stdlib.

modules.description: Food entity: manages food grid position. respawn() takes occupied cells, computes available set (all - occupied), random.choice one. Returns False when no cells available (victory).

modules.name: renderer

classes.name: Renderer
methods: draw_frame(self, snake: Snake, food: Food, score: int, state: GameState) -> None
classes.description: Encapsulates all Pygame drawing calls. Layer-based rendering: background -> snake (tail to head, head distinct color) -> food -> HUD -> conditional overlay (game over / victory). Manages pygame.time.Clock for frame rate control.

modules.description: Rendering layer: encapsulates all Pygame draw calls. Renders in layers: background fill, grid lines, snake body (head in distinct color), food, HUD score, and game-over/victory overlay. Uses pygame.time.Clock for FPS control.

modules.name: input_handler

classes.name: InputHandler
methods: process_events(self, current_direction: Tuple[int, int], state: GameState) -> dict
classes.description: Processes Pygame event queue. Handles QUIT, KEYDOWN (arrows + R/Q), WINDOWEVENT_FOCUS_LOST/GAINED. Implements per-frame single-direction buffering: last valid direction key in a frame wins. Returns unified command dict with action and optional direction.

modules.description: Input processing: traverses pygame.event.get() queue, maps arrow keys to direction tuples with reverse-intercept check, handles R (restart) and Q (quit) in end states, detects focus loss for pause. Single-direction buffer per frame.

modules.name: game

classes.name: Game
classes.description: Game coordinator: holds all component instances, manages score and GameState state machine, orchestrates the main game loop (tick -> handle input -> update logic -> render -> flip).

modules.description: Game coordinator + GameState enum. Orchestrates main loop: tick, process events, handle command, update state (move, food collision, boundary/self collision, victory), render frame, flip. Manages RUNNING/GAME_OVER/VICTORY state machine.

modules.name: main
modules.description: Entry point: try/except ImportError for Pygame check, pygame.init(), instantiate Game, call run(), pygame.quit().

fields.name: body
fields.description: Snake body coordinates, index 0 is head. Initial: [(18,15), (19,15), (20,15)] for 3-cell length, centered, heading right.

relationships.foreignKey: N/A — runtime coordinate comparison snake.head == food.position triggers food consumption

fields.name: position
fields.description: Food grid coordinate. Placeholder (-1, -1) until first respawn().
constraints: must not equal any cell in snake.body

relationships.foreignKey: N/A — mutual exclusion: food.position must differ from all snake.body elements; at most one food instance exists

fields.name: RUNNING
fields.description: Active gameplay: snake moves, input accepted, collisions evaluated.

fields.name: GAME_OVER
fields.description: Snake hit boundary or itself. Movement frozen, R key restarts.

fields.name: VICTORY
fields.description: All 1200 cells occupied by snake. R key restarts.

fields.name: action
fields.description: Dispatched command type from InputHandler to Game.
constraints: one of: direction, restart, quit, pause, resume, none

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Target direction vector, present only when action='direction'.

keyFlows.name: 游戏启动流程
steps: 1. main(): try import pygame, catch ImportError -> print hint + sys.exit(1)
3. Game.__init__(): create window (800x600), set caption, instantiate Snake (center, 3 cells, right), Food (placeholder -1,-1), Renderer (fonts + clock), InputHandler
4. food.respawn(snake.body): compute available cells, random pick one
errorScenarios: Pygame not installed: ImportError caught, print install hint, exit(1)
SDL init failure: pygame.init() raises pygame.error

keyFlows.name: 主循环单帧流程
steps: 4. _update(): if RUNNING and not paused — detect food collision, move_and_grow, update score, respawn food, check boundary/self collision
5. renderer.draw_frame(): layered rendering (background -> snake -> food -> HUD -> overlay)
errorScenarios: boundary collision: head out of grid -> GAME_OVER
self collision: head in body[1:] -> GAME_OVER

keyFlows.name: 蛇移动与碰撞检测
steps: 4. After move: check boundary (x<0 or x>=cols or y<0 or y>=rows)
5. After move: check self (head in body[1:])
errorScenarios: Reverse direction input: change_direction ignores (-dx, -dy), returns False
Snake length == 1: check_self_collision always False (body[1:] is empty)

keyFlows.name: 食物碰撞与重新生成
steps: 4. food.respawn(snake.body): build all_cells set, exclude occupied, random choice
5. If available set empty: return False -> state = VICTORY
errorScenarios: All cells occupied: respawn returns False -> VICTORY instead of error
Food at (-1,-1) placeholder: renderer checks before drawing

keyFlows.name: 游戏重新开始流程
steps: 1. User presses R in GAME_OVER/VICTORY state
4. snake.reset(): body and direction restored to initial
errorScenarios: R key pressed during RUNNING: ignored (only effective in GAME_OVER/VICTORY)

keyFlows.name: 窗口焦点丢失流程
steps: 3. Game._update() skips logic when paused (snake frozen)
errorScenarios: Platform does not support focus events: _paused stays False, game continues (degraded but no crash)

errorHandling.strategy: No logging framework. Startup errors via print() to stderr + sys.exit(). Runtime errors via Python default traceback. Pygame errors propagate as pygame.error exceptions.

errorCodes.message: Pygame is not installed. Please run: pip install pygame
All cells occupied by snake — victory condition, not an error
Window focus lost — pause game logic; degrade to continue if platform does not support focus events

errorHandling.loggingStrategy: No logging framework used. Startup errors: print() to stderr. Debug info (optional): print() for dev, removed before release. Pygame tracebacks: native stderr output.
errorHandling.fallbackStrategy: Focus detection: pause on FOCUS_LOST, degrade to continue if event unsupported. Font loading: use pygame.font.Font(None, size) for system default fallback. Display mode: Pygame/SDL2 auto-selects nearest available mode.

summary: 详细设计覆盖7个模块（Config/Snake/Food/Renderer/InputHandler/Game/main），定义6个类及完整方法签名、属性类型、算法细节。无REST API（桌面游戏）。4个数据实体含字段约束和关系。6条关键流程含步骤和错误场景。错误处理含4个场景的处置策略和降级方案。
